name: DateTimePicker

aliases.name: State
aliases.comment: The state of the date time picker (for Internal Use)

values.name: datePicker
values.comment:
Date Picker view function with default configuration.

Example:
type alias Model = { datePickerState : DateTimePicker.State, value : Maybe Date }

    type Msg
        = DatePickerChanged DateTimePicker.State (Maybe Date)

    view =
        DateTimePicker.datePicker
            DatePickerChanged
            [ class "my-datepicker" ]
            model.datePickerState
            model.value
values.type: (State -> Maybe Date -> msg) -> List (Attribute msg) -> State -> Maybe Date -> Html msg

values.name: datePickerWithConfig
values.comment:
Date Picker view function with custom configuration.

Example:
type alias Model = { datePickerState : DateTimePicker.State, value : Maybe Date }

    type Msg
        = DatePickerChanged DateTimePicker.State (Maybe Date)

    customConfig =
        let
            default =
                DateTimePicker.defaultConfig DatePickerChanged
        in
        { default
            | firstDayOfWeek = Date.Mon
            , autoClose = True
        }

    view =
        DateTimePicker.datePickerWithConfig
            customConfig
            DateTimePicker.defaultDatePickerConfig
            [ class "my-datepicker" ]
            model.datePickerState
            model.value
values.type: Config (DatePickerConfig {}) msg -> List (Attribute msg) -> State -> Maybe Date -> Html msg

values.name: dateTimePicker
values.comment:
Date and Time Picker view with default configuration
Example:
type alias Model = { dateTimePickerState : DateTimePicker.State, value : Maybe DateType }

    type Msg
        = DatePickerChanged DateTimePicker.State (Maybe Date)

    view =
        DateTimePicker.dateTimePicker
            DatePickerChanged
            [ class "my-datetimepicker" ]
            model.dateTimePickerState
            model.value
values.type: (State -> Maybe Date -> msg) -> List (Attribute msg) -> State -> Maybe Date -> Html msg

values.name: dateTimePickerWithConfig
values.comment:
Date and Time Picker view with custom configuration
Example:
type alias Model = { dateTimePickerState : DateTimePicker.State, value : Maybe Date }

    type Msg
        = DatePickerChanged DateTimePicker.State (Maybe Date)

    customConfig =
        let
            default =
                DateTimePicker.defaultDateTimePickerConfig DatePickerChanged
        in
        { default
            | firstDayOfWeek = Date.Mon
            , autoClose = True
        }

    view =
        DateTimePicker.dateTimePickerWithConfig
            customConfig
            [ class "my-datetimepicker" ]
            model.dateTimePickerState
            model.value
values.type: Config (DatePickerConfig TimePickerConfig) msg -> List (Attribute msg) -> State -> Maybe Date -> Html msg

values.name: initialCmd
values.comment: Initial Cmd to set the initial month to be displayed in the datepicker to the current month.
values.type: (State -> Maybe Date -> msg) -> State -> Cmd msg

values.name: initialStateWithToday
values.comment: Initial state of the DatePicker with today Date

values.name: timePicker
values.comment:
Time Picker view with default configuration
Example:
type alias Model = { timePickerState : DateTimePicker.State, value : Maybe DateType }

    type Msg
        = TimePickerChanged DateTimePicker.State (Maybe Date)

    view =

            TimePickerChanged
            [ class "my-timepicker" ]

values.type: (State -> Maybe Date -> msg) -> List (Attribute msg) -> State -> Maybe Date -> Html msg

values.comment:
Time Picker view with custom configuration
Example:

    type Msg
        = TimePickerChanged DateTimePicker.State (Maybe Date)

    customConfig =
        let
            default =
                DateTimePicker.defaultTimePickerConfig TimePickerChanged
        in
        { default
            | autoClose = True
        }

    view =
        DateTimePicker.timePickerWithConfig
            customConfig

values.type: Config TimePickerConfig msg -> List (Attribute msg) -> State -> Maybe Date -> Html msg

name: DateTimePicker.Config

unions.name: TimePickerType
unions.comment: The type of time picker, can be either Digital or Analog

unions.name: Type
unions.comment: The type of picker (for Internal Use)

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
Configuration

  - `onChange` is the message for when the selected value and internal `State` in the date picker has changed.
  - `autoClose` is a flag to indicate whether the dialog should be automatically closed when a date and/or time is selected.
  - `i18n` is internationalization configuration.
aliases.type: { otherConfig | onChange : State -> Maybe Date -> msg, autoClose : Bool, i18n : I18n, usePicker : Bool, attributes : List (Attribute msg) }

aliases.name: DatePickerConfig
aliases.comment:
Configuration for the DatePicker

  - `nameOfDays` is the configuration for name of days in a week.
  - `firstDayOfWeek` is the first day of the week.
  - `titleFormatter` is the Date to String formatter for the dialog's title.
  - `footerFormatter` is the Date to String formatter for the dialog's footer.
  - `allowYearNavigation` show/hide year navigation button.
aliases.type: { otherConfig | nameOfDays : NameOfDays, firstDayOfWeek : Day, allowYearNavigation : Bool }

aliases.name: I18n
aliases.comment:
Internationalization configuration

  - `footerFormatter` is a Date to string formatter used to display the date in the footer section.
  - `titleFormatter` is a Date to string formatter used to display the date in the title section.
  - `timeTitleFormatter` is a Date to string formatter used to display the time in the title section.
  - `inputFormat` is an input date formatter and parser.
aliases.type: { titleFormatter : Date -> String, footerFormatter : Date -> String, timeTitleFormatter : Date -> String, inputFormat : InputFormat }

aliases.name: InputFormat
aliases.comment:
Input formatter and parser

  - `inputFormatter` is a Date to string formatter used to display the date in the input text
  - `inputParser` is a String to Date parser used to parsed input text into Date
aliases.type: { inputFormatter : Date -> String, inputParser : String -> Maybe Date }

aliases.name: NameOfDays
aliases.comment:
Configuration for name of days in a week.

This will be displayed as the calendar's header.
Default:

  - sunday = "Su"
  - monday = "Mo"
  - tuesday = "Tu"
  - wednesday = "We"
  - thursday = "Th"
  - friday = "Fr"
  - saturday = "Sa"
aliases.type: { sunday : String, monday : String, tuesday : String, wednesday : String, thursday : String, friday : String, saturday : String }

aliases.name: TimePickerConfig
aliases.comment:
Configuration for TimePicker

  - `timePickerType` is the type of the time picker, either Analog or Digital

values.name: defaultDateI18n
values.comment:
Default Date internationalization

  - `titleFormatter` Default: `"%B %Y"`
  - `footerFormatter` Default: `"%A, %B %d, %Y"`
  - `inputFormat` Default: "%m/%d/%Y"

values.name: defaultDateInputFormat
values.comment: Default input format for date picker

values.name: defaultDatePickerConfig
values.comment:
Default configuration for DatePicker

  - `onChange` No Default
  - `autoClose` Default: True
  - `nameOfDays` see `NameOfDays` for the default values.
  - `firstDayOfWeek` Default: Sunday.
  - `allowYearNavigation` Default : True

values.name: defaultDateTimeI18n
values.comment:
Default Date and Time internationalization

  - `titleFormatter` Default: `"%B %Y"`
  - `footerFormatter` Default: `"%A, %B %d, %Y"`
  - `inputFormat` Default: "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M %p"

values.name: defaultDateTimeInputFormat
values.comment: Default input format for date and time picker

values.name: defaultDateTimePickerConfig
values.comment:
Default configuration for DateTimePicker

  - `onChange` No Default
  - `dateFormatter` Default: `"%m/%d/%Y"`
  - `dateTimeFormatter` Default: `"%m/%d/%Y %I:%M %p"`
  - `autoClose` Default: False
  - `nameOfDays` see `NameOfDays` for the default values.
  - `firstDayOfWeek` Default: Sunday.
  - `titleFormatter` Default: `"%B %Y"`
  - `fullDateFormatter` Default: `"%A, %B %d, %Y"`
  - `timeFormatter` Default: `"%I:%M %p"`
  - `timePickerType` Default: Analog
  - `allowYearNavigation` Default : True
values.type: (State -> Maybe Date -> msg) -> Config (DatePickerConfig TimePickerConfig) msg

values.name: defaultTimeI18n
values.comment:
Default Time internationalization

  - `titleFormatter` Default: `"%B %Y"`
  - `footerFormatter` Default: `"%A, %B %d, %Y"`
  - `inputFormat` Default: "%I:%M %p"

values.name: defaultTimePickerConfig
values.comment:
Default configuration for TimePicker

  - `onChange` No Default
  - `dateFormatter` Default: `"%m/%d/%Y"`
  - `dateTimeFormatter` Default: `"%m/%d/%Y %I:%M %p"`
  - `autoClose` Default: False
  - `timeFormatter` Default: `"%I:%M %p"`
  - `timePickerType` Default: Analog
values.type: (State -> Maybe Date -> msg) -> Config TimePickerConfig msg

name: DateTimePicker.Css
comment:
DateTimePicker.Css

Using [rtfeldman/elm-css](http://package.elm-lang.org/packages/rtfeldman/elm-css/latest)
Include this in your elm-css port module to be included in your project's css file.
